name: desktop-act
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the desktop-act MCP server

plugins.name: desktop-act
plugins.description: Computer-use primitives + multi-desktop pool + autonomous act() loop for Claude Code. One MCP server exposes screenshot/click/type/keypress/scroll/launch_app over a pooled Xvnc + websockify backend, with persistent X11 connection caching and SHA-deduped screenshots. Auth via claude-agent-sdk OAuth — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required.
